scope_approved.evidence: TASK-15 notes record operator approval of the persistently displayed doc-25 plan before implementation

update_skill.evidence: Commit 5f69cbe updates bpmn-plans prospectively to same-PR conformance and preserves historical records

verification_entry.evidence: Verification ran after initial implementation and again after correcting the reviewed plan evidence citation

validate_skill.evidence: skill-creator quick_validate reported Skill is valid; trigger/body coherence and diff hygiene were inspected

forward_test.evidence: A valid fresh-context test read the revised Skill and selected one owning PR, strict pre-Done conformance, same-PR closeout, final rechecks, and no post-merge conformance Change

review_change.evidence: Independent read-only review inspected the Skill, TASK-15, and doc-25 plan artifacts before commit and publication

review_decision.evidence: The findings branch was taken once for a pre-closeout gateway evidence cycle, then the green branch after correction

fix_findings.evidence: The owning-PR green gateway now cites deliver-change lines 29-31; regenerated BPMN passes lint/round trip and the exact delta has no material findings

publish_pr.evidence: Reviewed commit 5f69cbe was pushed and published in the single owning PR #47

pr_decision.evidence: PR #47 at head 5f69cbe was OPEN, CLEAN, MERGEABLE, with no configured status checks and matching local/remote head SHAs

fix_pr_failure.note: The initial owning-PR head was green, so no failed GitHub check required another behavioral correction

green_pr_handoff.evidence: The planned implementation reached a green owning-PR state before conformance closeout; PR #47 remained open for same-PR conformance and Task finalization
